blockingIssues.description: src/app/page.tsx:56 reconstructs chess.js from only the latest FEN on every render, so move history is discarded and isThreefoldRepetition() can never report the required draw condition during real gameplay.
src/app/page.tsx:428 still renders game-over state as an inline result banner instead of the requested premium game-over overlay, so the feature is incomplete.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` to note that frontend threefold-repetition detection must preserve live chess.js move history rather than recreating state from the latest FEN alone.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Replace the stale `cd web && ...` examples with repo-root commands from `.factory/services.yaml`, and update the documented `useChessEngine` return shape to match the live hook (`isReady`, `isThinking`, `error`, `searchBestMove`, `evaluatePosition`, `resetEngine`).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The board-component, board-interaction, and game-feature reviews all flagged the nonexistent `web/` directory, and the board-component plus board-interaction reviews flagged that the skill still documents an obsolete hook API that no longer matches `src/hooks/useChessEngine.ts`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a verification fallback for the mission-mandated `3001` dev server: when `pnpm dev --turbopack --port 3001` hits `EADDRINUSE`, confirm the existing process is healthy and reuse it instead of switching ports.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The board-component, engine-play, and game-features reviews each cited worker handoffs where validation hit `EADDRINUSE` on port 3001 and had to reuse an already-running healthy server because alternate ports are disallowed by mission guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a frontend-state invariant for draw detection: when UI logic depends on `chess.js` repetition APIs, features must preserve live move history instead of reconstructing game state from the current FEN alone.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The website-engine-play review found a blocking defect where `src/app/page.tsx` rebuilt `new Chess(gameSnapshot.fen)` each render, which dropped repetition state and made threefold-repetition draws impossible despite being part of the feature contract.

rejectedObservations.observation: The repeated repo-root command observation from website-board-interaction, website-engine-play, and website-game-features.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of the accepted frontend-worker command-guidance update.

rejectedObservations.observation: The repeated outdated `useChessEngine` API observation from website-board-interaction.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of the accepted frontend-worker API-guidance update.

rejectedObservations.observation: The repeated `EADDRINUSE` fallback observation from website-engine-play and website-game-features.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of the accepted port-3001 fallback guidance update.

rejectedObservations.observation: The website-game-features suggestion to document deterministic finished-game setup for post-game verification.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected as non-essential validator technique guidance rather than a broadly reusable shared-state rule for the codebase.
